title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Independent Network Trial
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a tested network continuity plan with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define RPO and RTO from business impact and map them to backup, replication, restoration, and test requirements.
Use MTTR and MTBF as population and process indicators without treating averages as individual guarantees.
Compare cold, warm, and hot sites by readiness, data, network, staffing, cost, and activation time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.instruction:

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a safe investigation headed "# Evidence: net-dr-testing-1xnbcl" with a concrete hypothesis, one read-only network command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Dr Testing into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: net-dr-testing-1xnbcl
# hypothesis: [replace with one falsifiable probable cause]
# command: choose one safe read-only simulator command
# observation: [replace with the result that supports or rejects the hypothesis]

stimulus.title: Net Dr Testing failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A written disaster-recovery plan is proven once leadership approves it.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run tabletop and validation tests with scenarios, observers, success criteria, rollback, evidence, and remediation owners.

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Net Dr Testing condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Net Dr Testing applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Run tabletop and validation tests with scenarios, observers, success criteria, rollback, evidence, and remediation owners.
